ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: and( isblank( Registration_Closed_Message__c ), ispickval( ProgramType__c ,"Keytana"), or( and( text( ProgramStatus__c )<>"Open for registration", text(priorvalue(ProgramStatus__c ))="Open for registration"), text( ProgramStatus__c )="Open for registration" ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please Enter a message to show when registration is closed
